text: Now let me read the istiocsr deployments.go and its constants to understand the structure.

content:
1	package istiocsr
2	
3	import (
4		"os"
5		"strings"
6		"time"
7	
8		certmanagerapi "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager"
9		certmanagerv1 "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1"
10	)
11	
12	const (
13		// istiocsrCommonName is the name commonly used for naming resources.
14		istiocsrCommonName = "cert-manager-istio-csr"
15	
16		// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.
17		ControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + "-controller"
18	
19		// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after
20		// successful reconciliation by the controller.
21		controllerProcessedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed"
22	
23		// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple
24		// instances of istiocsr resource is created.
25		controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance"
26	
27		// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.
28		finalizer = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/" + ControllerName
29	
30		// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.
31		defaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30
32	
33		// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.
34		// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.
35		istiocsrObjectName = "default"
36	
37		// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.
38		istiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName
39	
40		// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
41		// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.
42		istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = "RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR"
43	
44		// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
45		// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.
46		istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = "ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION"
47	
48		// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr
49		// when no custom cluster ID is configured.
50		defaultClusterID = "Kubernetes"
51	
52		// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is
53		// specified, the DNS SAN uses the base istiod service name rather than a
54		// revision-prefixed name.
55		defaultIstioRevision = "default"
56	
57		// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.
58		istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt = "%s.%s.svc:%d"
59	
60		// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name
61		// and default DNS name.
62		istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt = "istiod.%s.svc"
63	
64		// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name
65		// for each defined revision.
66		istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName = "istiod-%s.%s.svc"
67	
68		// istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate URI.
69		istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt = "spiffe://%s/ns/%s/sa/istiod-service-account"
70	
71		// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources
72		// created in other namespaces by the controller.
73		istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName = "cert-manager-istio-csr-namespace"
74	
75		// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the
76		// controller but does not create or manage the resource.
77		IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/watched-by"
78	
79		// istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the value format assigned to istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName label, which
80		// will be of the form <istiocsr_namespace>/<istiocsr_instance-Name>.
81		istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = "%s_%s"
82	
83		// IstiocsrCAConfigMapName is the name of the configmap which is mounted in istiocsr container, containing the
84		// CA certificate configured in the secret referenced in the issuer.
85		IstiocsrCAConfigMapName = istiocsrCommonName + "-issuer-ca-copy"
86	
87		// IstiocsrCAKeyName is the key name holding the CA certificate in the issuer secret or the controller
88		// CA configmap.
89		IstiocsrCAKeyName = "ca.crt"
90	)
91	
92	var (
93		controllerDefaultResourceLabels = map[string]string{
94			"app":                          istiocsrCommonName,
95			"app.kubernetes.io/name":       istiocsrCommonName,
96			"app.kubernetes.io/instance":   istiocsrCommonName,
97			"app.kubernetes.io/version":    os.Getenv(istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName),
98			"app.kubernetes.io/managed-by": "cert-manager-operator",
99			"app.kubernetes.io/part-of":    "cert-manager-operator",
100		}
101	)
102	
103	var (
104		clusterIssuerKind = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind)
105		issuerKind        = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.IssuerKind)
106		issuerGroup       = strings.ToLower(certmanagerapi.GroupName)
107	)
108	
109	// asset names are the files present in the root bindata/ dir. Which are then loaded
110	// and made available by the pkg/operator/assets package.
111	const (
112		certificateAssetName        = "istio-csr/istiod-certificate.yaml"
113		clusterRoleAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrole.yaml"
114		clusterRoleBindingAssetName = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrolebinding.yaml"
115		deploymentAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml"
116		roleAssetName               = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-role.yaml"
117		roleLeasesAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-role.yaml"
118		roleBindingAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-rolebinding.yaml"
119		roleBindingLeasesAssetName  = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-rolebinding.yaml"
120		serviceAssetName            = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-service.yaml"
121		metricsServiceAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-metrics-service.yaml"
122		serviceAccountAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-serviceaccount.yaml"
123	)
124	
125	const (
126		DefaultCertificateDuration            = time.Hour
127		DefaultCertificateRenewBeforeDuration = time.Minute * 30
128		DefaultPrivateKeyAlgorithm            = certmanagerv1.RSAKeyAlgorithm
129		DefaultRSAPrivateKeySize              = 2048
130		DefaultECDSA256PrivateKeySize         = 256
131		DefaultECDSA384PrivateKeySize         = 384
132	)
133	
134	var istioCSRNetworkPolicyAssets = []string{
135		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-deny-all-networkpolicy.yaml",
136		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-egress-to-api-server-networkpolicy.yaml",
137		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-metrics-networkpolicy.yaml",
138		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-grpc-networkpolicy.yaml",
139	}
140

1	apiVersion: apps/v1
2	kind: Deployment
3	metadata:
4	  name: cert-manager-istio-csr
5	  namespace: cert-manager
6	  labels:
7	    app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-istio-csr
8	    app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-istio-csr
9	    app.kubernetes.io/version: v0.16.0
10	    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: cert-manager-operator
11	spec:
12	  replicas: 1
13	  selector:
14	    matchLabels:
15	      app: cert-manager-istio-csr
16	  template:
17	    metadata:
18	      labels:
19	        app: cert-manager-istio-csr
20	        app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-istio-csr
21	        app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-istio-csr
22	        app.kubernetes.io/version: v0.16.0
23	    spec:
24	      serviceAccountName: cert-manager-istio-csr
25	      nodeSelector:
26	        kubernetes.io/os: linux
27	      containers:
28	        - name: cert-manager-istio-csr
29	          image: quay.io/jetstack/cert-manager-istio-csr:v0.16.0
30	          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
31	          ports:
32	            - containerPort: 6443
33	            - containerPort: 9402
34	          readinessProbe:
35	            httpGet:
36	              port: 6060
37	              path: /readyz
38	            initialDelaySeconds: 3
39	            periodSeconds: 7
40	          args:
41	            - --log-level=1
42	            - --log-format=text
43	            - --metrics-port=9402
44	            - --readiness-probe-port=6060
45	            - --readiness-probe-path=/readyz
46	            - --certificate-namespace=istio-system
47	            - --issuer-enabled=true
48	            - --issuer-name=istio-ca
49	            - --issuer-kind=Issuer
50	            - --issuer-group=cert-manager.io
51	            - --preserve-certificate-requests=false
52	            - --root-ca-file=
53	            - --serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.cert-manager.svc
54	            - --serving-certificate-duration=1h
55	            - --trust-domain=cluster.local
56	            - --cluster-id=Kubernetes
57	            - --max-client-certificate-duration=1h
58	            - --serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443
59	            - --serving-certificate-key-size=2048
60	            - --serving-signature-algorithm=RSA
61	            - --enable-client-cert-authenticator=false
62	            - --leader-election-namespace=istio-system
63	            - --disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false
64	            - --runtime-issuance-config-map-name=
65	            - --runtime-issuance-config-map-namespace=cert-manager
66	            - --istiod-cert-enabled=false
67	            - --istiod-cert-name=istiod-dynamic
68	            - --istiod-cert-namespace=istio-system
69	            - --istiod-cert-duration=1h
70	            - --istiod-cert-renew-before=30m
71	            - --istiod-cert-key-algorithm=RSA
72	            - --istiod-cert-key-size=2048
73	            - --istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=
74	            - --istiod-cert-istio-revisions=default
75	          resources: {}
76	          securityContext:
77	            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
78	            capabilities:
79	              drop:
80	                - ALL
81	            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
82	            runAsNonRoot: true
83	            seccompProfile:
84	              type: RuntimeDefault

1	---
2	apiVersion: apps/v1
3	kind: Deployment
4	metadata:
5	  name: trust-manager
6	  namespace: cert-manager
7	  labels:
8	    app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-trust-manager
9	    app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-trust-manager
10	    app.kubernetes.io/version: "v0.20.3"
11	    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: cert-manager-operator
12	    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: cert-manager-operator
13	spec:
14	  replicas: 1
15	  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
16	  selector:
17	    matchLabels:
18	      app: cert-manager-trust-manager
19	  template:
20	    metadata:
21	      labels:
22	        app: cert-manager-trust-manager
23	        app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-trust-manager
24	        app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-trust-manager
25	        app.kubernetes.io/version: "v0.20.3"
26	        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: cert-manager-operator
27	        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: cert-manager-operator
28	    spec:
29	      serviceAccountName: trust-manager
30	      automountServiceAccountToken: true
31	      containers:
32	        - name: trust-manager
33	          image: "quay.io/jetstack/trust-manager:v0.20.3"
34	          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
35	          ports:
36	            - containerPort: 6443
37	              name: webhook
38	            - containerPort: 9402
39	              name: metrics
40	          readinessProbe:
41	            httpGet:
42	              port: 6060
43	              path: /readyz
44	            initialDelaySeconds: 3
45	            periodSeconds: 7
46	          args:
47	            - "--log-format=text"
48	            - "--log-level=1"
49	            - "--metrics-port=9402"
50	            - "--readiness-probe-port=6060"
51	            - "--readiness-probe-path=/readyz"
52	            - "--leader-elect=true"
53	            - "--leader-election-lease-duration=15s"
54	            - "--leader-election-renew-deadline=10s"
55	            - "--trust-namespace=cert-manager"
56	            - "--webhook-host=0.0.0.0"
57	            - "--webhook-port=6443"
58	            - "--webhook-certificate-dir=/tls"
59	          volumeMounts:
60	            - mountPath: /tls
61	              name: tls
62	              readOnly: true
63	            - mountPath: /packages
64	              name: packages
65	              readOnly: true
66	          resources: {}
67	          securityContext:
68	            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
69	            capabilities:
70	              drop:
71	                - ALL
72	            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
73	            runAsNonRoot: true
74	            seccompProfile:
75	              type: RuntimeDefault
76	      nodeSelector:
77	        kubernetes.io/os: linux
78	      volumes:
79	        - name: packages
80	          emptyDir:
81	            sizeLimit: 50M
82	        - name: tls
83	          secret:
84	            defaultMode: 420
85	            secretName: trust-manager-tls
86

text:
Now I have a complete picture of the codebase. Let me draft the full implementation.

Here's the plan:
1. Add `root-ca` placeholder volume to the istiocsr bindata YAML
2. Add `validateDeploymentManifest` to `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go`
3. Call it in `getDeploymentObject` before mutations
4. Add table-driven test to `deployments_test.go`
5. Regenerate bindata with `make update-bindata`

---

## Complete Implementation

### File 1: `bindata/istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml`

Add a `root-ca` emptyDir placeholder volume and a corresponding volumeMount. The `updateVolumeWithIssuerCA` function already handles replacing this volume in-place with the real ConfigMap-backed volume during the mutation pipeline.

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cert-manager-istio-csr
  namespace: cert-manager
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-istio-csr
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-istio-csr
    app.kubernetes.io/version: v0.16.0
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: cert-manager-operator
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cert-manager-istio-csr
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cert-manager-istio-csr
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cert-manager-istio-csr
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: cert-manager-istio-csr
        app.kubernetes.io/version: v0.16.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: cert-manager-istio-csr
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/os: linux
      containers:
        - name: cert-manager-istio-csr
          image: quay.io/jetstack/cert-manager-istio-csr:v0.16.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6443
            - containerPort: 9402
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              port: 6060
              path: /readyz
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 7
          args:
            - --log-level=1
            - --log-format=text
            - --metrics-port=9402
            - --readiness-probe-port=6060
            - --readiness-probe-path=/readyz
            - --certificate-namespace=istio-system
            - --issuer-enabled=true
            - --issuer-name=istio-ca
            - --issuer-kind=Issuer
            - --issuer-group=cert-manager.io
            - --preserve-certificate-requests=false
            - --root-ca-file=
            - --serving-certificate-dns-names=cert-manager-istio-csr.cert-manager.svc
            - --serving-certificate-duration=1h
            - --trust-domain=cluster.local
            - --cluster-id=Kubernetes
            - --max-client-certificate-duration=1h
            - --serving-address=0.0.0.0:6443
            - --serving-certificate-key-size=2048
            - --serving-signature-algorithm=RSA
            - --enable-client-cert-authenticator=false
            - --leader-election-namespace=istio-system
            - --disable-kubernetes-client-rate-limiter=false
            - --runtime-issuance-config-map-name=
            - --runtime-issuance-config-map-namespace=cert-manager
            - --istiod-cert-enabled=false
            - --istiod-cert-name=istiod-dynamic
            - --istiod-cert-namespace=istio-system
            - --istiod-cert-duration=1h
            - --istiod-cert-renew-before=30m
            - --istiod-cert-key-algorithm=RSA
            - --istiod-cert-key-size=2048
            - --istiod-cert-additional-dns-names=
            - --istiod-cert-istio-revisions=default
          volumeMounts:
            - name: root-ca
              mountPath: /var/run/configmaps/istio-csr
              readOnly: true
          resources: {}
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
      volumes:
        - name: root-ca
          emptyDir: {}
```

The additions are:
- Lines under `volumeMounts:` in the container (new section)
- Lines under `volumes:` in the pod spec (new section)

The `root-ca` emptyDir acts as a placeholder. `updateVolumeWithIssuerCA` already handles both "update existing" and "append new" for this volume name, so it will replace the emptyDir with a ConfigMap-backed volume during the mutation pipeline. The volumeMount is similarly updated in-place by `updateVolumeWithIssuerCA`.

### File 2: `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go`

Add the `validateDeploymentManifest` function and call it in `getDeploymentObject`. Add the `rootCAVolumeName` constant.

**Add constant** (at the top of the file, near `caVolumeMountPath`):

```go
const (
	caVolumeMountPath = "/var/run/configmaps/istio-csr"
	rootCAVolumeName  = "root-ca"
)
```

**Add the validation function** (before `updatePodTemplateLabels`):

```go
// validateDeploymentManifest checks that the bindata deployment contains the
// expected container and root-ca volume. Without these, the mutation helpers
// silently no-op and the operator would apply a deployment with stale defaults.
func validateDeploymentManifest(deployment *appsv1.Deployment) error {
	hasContainer := false
	for _, c := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers {
		if c.Name == istiocsrContainerName {
			hasContainer = true
			break
		}
	}
	if !hasContainer {
		return fmt.Errorf("deployment manifest missing required container %q", istiocsrContainerName)
	}

	hasVolume := false
	for _, v := range deployment.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes {
		if v.Name == rootCAVolumeName {
			hasVolume = true
			break
		}
	}
	if !hasVolume {
		return fmt.Errorf("deployment manifest missing required volume %q", rootCAVolumeName)
	}

	return nil
}
```

**Call it in `getDeploymentObject`** — insert the validation right after decoding the deployment, before the first mutation:

Change in `getDeploymentObject` (lines 78-80 currently):

```go
func (r *Reconciler) getDeploymentObject(istiocsr *v1alpha1.IstioCSR, resourceLabels map[string]string) (*appsv1.Deployment, error) {
	if err := r.assertIssuerRefExists(istiocsr); err != nil {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to verify issuer in %s/%s: %w", istiocsr.GetNamespace(), istiocsr.GetName(), err)
	}

	deployment := decodeDeploymentObjBytes(assets.MustAsset(deploymentAssetName))

	if err := validateDeploymentManifest(deployment); err != nil {
		return nil, common.NewIrrecoverableError(err, "invalid istio-csr deployment manifest")
	}

	common.UpdateNamespace(deployment, istiocsr.GetNamespace())
	// ... rest unchanged
```

### File 3: `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments_test.go`

Add the table-driven test at the end of the file:

```go
func TestValidateDeploymentManifest(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name       string
		deployment *appsv1.Deployment
		wantErr    string
	}{
		{
			name:       "valid manifest passes validation",
			deployment: testDeployment(),
		},
		{
			name: "missing required container is detected",
			deployment: func() *appsv1.Deployment {
				d := testDeployment()
				d.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers = []corev1.Container{
					{Name: "wrong-container"},
				}
				return d
			}(),
			wantErr: fmt.Sprintf("deployment manifest missing required container %q", istiocsrContainerName),
		},
		{
			name: "missing required volume is detected",
			deployment: func() *appsv1.Deployment {
				d := testDeployment()
				d.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = nil
				return d
			}(),
			wantErr: fmt.Sprintf("deployment manifest missing required volume %q", rootCAVolumeName),
		},
		{
			name: "empty containers list is detected",
			deployment: func() *appsv1.Deployment {
				d := testDeployment()
				d.Spec.Template.Spec.Containers = nil
				return d
			}(),
			wantErr: fmt.Sprintf("deployment manifest missing required container %q", istiocsrContainerName),
		},
		{
			name: "wrong volume name is detected",
			deployment: func() *appsv1.Deployment {
				d := testDeployment()
				d.Spec.Template.Spec.Volumes = []corev1.Volume{
					{Name: "wrong-volume"},
				}
				return d
			}(),
			wantErr: fmt.Sprintf("deployment manifest missing required volume %q", rootCAVolumeName),
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			err := validateDeploymentManifest(tt.deployment)
			if tt.wantErr != "" {
				if err == nil {
					t.Fatalf("validateDeploymentManifest() expected error %q, got nil", tt.wantErr)
				}
				if err.Error() != tt.wantErr {
					t.Errorf("validateDeploymentManifest() error = %q, want %q", err.Error(), tt.wantErr)
				}
			} else {
				if err != nil {
					t.Errorf("validateDeploymentManifest() unexpected error: %v", err)
				}
			}
		})
	}
}
```

Add `"fmt"` to the imports at the top of `deployments_test.go` if it isn't already there. Looking at the existing imports — `fmt` is not currently imported in `deployments_test.go`, so add it.

### Summary of changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `bindata/istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml` | Add `root-ca` emptyDir volume and volumeMount as placeholder (replaced at runtime by `updateVolumeWithIssuerCA`) |
| `pkg/operator/assets/bindata.go` | Regenerated (via `make update-bindata`) |
| `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go` | Add `rootCAVolumeName` constant, `validateDeploymentManifest` function, and call it in `getDeploymentObject` before mutations |
| `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments_test.go` | Add `TestValidateDeploymentManifest` table-driven test with 5 cases covering: valid manifest, missing container, missing volume, empty containers, wrong volume name |

The pattern mirrors `pkg/controller/trustmanager/deployments.go:validateDeploymentManifest` exactly — hardcoded checks for a required container name and a required volume name, called immediately after decoding the bindata asset and before any mutation helpers run. The `updateVolumeWithIssuerCA` function already handles both update-in-place (volume exists) and append (volume missing), so adding the placeholder volume to bindata doesn't change runtime behavior — the emptyDir is always replaced with the real ConfigMap-backed volume.
